purpose: Process, preparation, human behind the brand. Phone-camera aesthetic for authenticity.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic behind-the-scenes photograph showing {process_descriptor} in progress at {setting_descriptor}, intentionally phone-camera aesthetic with slight grain, natural ambient interior lighting, candid framing not posed, real hands and surfaces visible, slight motion blur suggesting genuine moment, focal length 28mm phone camera, authentic non-staged composition, warm interior tones {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: U04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default to Saudi-specific process: dallah brewing for coffee, traditional kunafa for desserts, abaya tailoring for fashion. Authentic Saudi process imagery dramatically outperforms generic. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
